summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Course Builder MVP. Frontend and authentication flows work excellently. Backend basic operations work but AI course generation has timeout issues.

critical_bugs.issue: AI course generation times out with 502 error after 30+ seconds
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core feature - users cannot create courses via AI
critical_bugs.details: Likely Claude Sonnet 4.5 API timeout or configuration issue with Emergent LLM service

passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status (200 OK)
Landing page loads with hero section, features, and CTA buttons
OAuth login flow redirects correctly to auth.emergentagent.com
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to landing page
User authentication and session management works
Dashboard displays correctly for authenticated users
Course generator form accepts input and validates fields
Logout functionality works and clears sessions
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
User profile information displays in header
Back navigation between dashboard and generator works

success_percentage.backend: 40% (4/10 tests passed - blocked by AI generation timeout)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix AI course generation timeout in /api/courses/generate endpoint. Issue appears to be with Claude Sonnet 4.5 API calls through Emergent LLM service - either API key issue, request timeout configuration, or service availability. All other functionality works perfectly.
